name: Akihiko Shiraishi || OWH
description:
!!Requested!!

"Hey! Where were you all summer? I was trying to text you, but you didn't even look at my messages!"

In which case Akihiko and you are best friends and went to the same school school and boarding school for seven years. He tried to message you during the summer, but you never answered. To your answer is what you decided..

CN: I'm so sorry! I was having trouble during the summer and with homework! School started back up so im just now catching up on everything! I post almost regularly on my youtube if you wanna check it out! I will put the link in my bio for anyone who wants it! I'm so sorry for the person who requested this! It took so long but I finally got it for you! Thank you introducing me to this fandom I loved reading it on webtoon!
creator: melodyagainsttheworld
